rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Educ. Code §11.0511, which governs student trustee positions in certain school districts. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 11.0511. STUDENT TRUSTEE FOR CERTAIN DISTRICTS.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict exists.
